title: Add App Logo and App Name to Navigation Bar

requirements.summary: Generate a professional government/civic services app logo image for the navigation bar using the application's teal/slate blue color palette on a transparent background
acceptanceCriteria: A logo image file is generated and placed in frontend/public/assets/generated/
The logo is visually appropriate for a civic/government complaint management context
The logo uses the application's established teal/slate blue color palette

file_operations.description: Place the generated government/civic services emblem-style logo image (app-logo.dim_128x128.png) into the frontend assets directory. This logo will be used in the navigation bar to brand the Complaint Management System.

requirements.summary: Update the Layout component to display the generated app logo image alongside the app name 'Complaint Management System' as a branded header unit in the top navigation bar, with both acting as a home link to the dashboard
acceptanceCriteria: The top navigation bar displays the app logo image to the left of the app name text
The app name 'Complaint Management System' is displayed in bold, styled consistently with the civic theme
The logo and app name together link to the dashboard (/) route
The layout remains responsive and the logo/name display correctly on both desktop and mobile viewports
The existing navigation links (Submit Complaint, Complaints Dashboard, Officers) remain intact and functional

file_operations.description: Update the navigation bar to include the generated app logo image (frontend/public/assets/generated/app-logo.dim_128x128.png) displayed at 36x36px alongside the app name 'Complaint Management System' in bold text. Wrap both the logo and name in a Link component pointing to the dashboard route (/). Ensure the branding unit appears on the left side of the navigation bar and remains responsive across desktop and mobile viewports. Preserve all existing navigation links and their functionality.
